scene.message: Masked Boy: You're late.{waitkey}{nl} Have you met her yet?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Her...{waitkey}{nl} What do you mean?{waitkey}{ret}
Masked Boy: What did{nl} she say?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: That she'd destroy{nl} the school, more or less.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Huh?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Hey!{waitkey}{nl} You're Kandori, aren't you!?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Who was that...{nl} that weird mask...{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Nothing here.{nl} Let's move on.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Is this the old{nl} student council room?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: "Love thy neighbor"?{nl} What's that supposed to mean?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: ......{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Was there anything{nl} of note?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: That guy looked{nl} familiar somehow.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: That person...{nl} not frozen at all...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Is Ayase really{nl} a high school student?{waitkey}{ret}
